It is also safe for your baby, so there is no need to wash off any residual cream from your breasts before breastfeeding. In addition, it can be used to moisturize various areas of dry skin, like chapped lips, abrasions, the diaper rash, dry hands and cuticles, elbows and cracked heels. Protects the sensitive and dry skin of babies, children and adults during cold weather and whenever needed. U digestoře se postaráte o její dlouhou životnost a odsavač par se vám za to odvděčí vysoce efektivním výkonem. Balení obsahuje 2 kusy filtru.
